# RF · Core Network · Space Handbook
# https://rfcn.space

> A bilingual Vietnamese & English open technical handbook for RF engineering,
> core network architecture, and space engineering.

## About

This site publishes free, deeply-written technical lessons at engineering depth
for Vietnamese and English-speaking learners. Content covers:

- RF Engineering (antenna theory, propagation, link budgets, modulation)
- Core Network Architecture (5G SBA, EPC, O-RAN, cloud-native core)
- Space Engineering (orbital mechanics, satellite communications, link design)

All lessons are available at /en/... and /vi/... URLs.

## Full content index

For a complete structured index of all published lessons, see:
https://rfcn.space/llms-full.txt
